name: Zucchini Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon. Set aside.
4. In another large bowl, beat the eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, and oil until well combined.
5. Gradually add the grated zucchini to the egg mixture and stir until incorporated.
6. Mix in the flour mixture until just combined.
7. Stir in the crushed pineapple and chopped walnuts.
8. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups.
9. Bake for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
